title: Supreme Court declines to expunge Delhi HC remarks against WFI over Vinesh Phogat row
description: The Supreme Court on Thursday declined to expunge the observations made by Delhi High Court in its recent judgment allowing wrestler Vinesh Phogat to participate in the Asian Games 2026 selection trials.A bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Aravind Kumar said that the plea moved by Wrestling Federation of India (WFI) against the High Court verdict had become infructuous since Phogat eventually participated in the trials following an order passed by the Supreme Court on May 29.Though the Bench tod
